attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

codes_manifest.display: Calculus of gallbladder without cholecystitis, without obstruction

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00020, derived from source AUC-020) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person IM ketorolac/ondansetron administration with objective pain-score improvement; telehealth reprojection replaces this with oral analgesia guidance and prompt in-person review rather than parenteral treatment, which cannot be delivered via chat.

Vitals and physical exam (negative Murphy's sign, no rebound/guarding) were clinician-obtained in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered; sealed into 10/11 as telehealth-unobtainable.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible middle-aged adult age (52) consistent with gallstone epidemiology and 'spouse present' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
